Appearances:
Plaintiff Jordan Golani is present.
Attorney Karen Uchiyama for the plaintiff.
Defendant Radford Hall is present.
Attorney Ryan Vlasak appearing for the defendant.

The Judge Pro Tem , litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of Mar. 9, 2015 is vacated. (501/jpt)
